items.name: actionable-notification
items.title: ActionableNotification
items.description: A status banner with an inline call-to-action. Use when the user must read a status message and can act on it directly from the message itself, without leaving their flow.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: A navigation trail showing the user's location in a hierarchy. Use at the top of a page when the route is more than two levels deep and back-navigation by hierarchy is useful.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A clickable element that triggers an action. Use for form submissions, dialog confirmations, navigation that performs work, and any primary call-to-action.

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.description: A permanent, non-dismissible inline notification for contextual information that stays on the page. Use for static advisories inside a panel, form, or page section — not for transient feedback.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A binary or tri-state input for selecting one or more independent options. Use inside forms, list multi-select, or "select all" headers — anywhere the user toggles state independently per row.

items.name: combo-box
items.title: ComboBox
items.description: A searchable, type-to-filter selection input. Use when the user picks one (or several) options from a list large enough that an open `Select` would be unwieldy, or when free-form filtering improves discoverability.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: DatePicker
items.description: A composition of `Popover` + `Calendar` for selecting one date, a date range, or multiple dates. Use in forms or filters when the user must pick from a calendar grid rather than type a free-form date.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: Dropdown
items.description: A single-select listbox for picking one option from a fixed set. The shadcn migration target is **`Select`**, not `DropdownMenu` — `DropdownMenu` is the action-menu primitive (Carbon's `OverflowMenu` / `MenuButton`).

items.name: icon-button
items.title: IconButton
items.description: A square button that contains only an icon, paired with a tooltip for the accessible label. Use in toolbars, table rows, and dense surfaces where text labels would not fit.

items.name: inline-loading
items.title: InlineLoading
items.description: A small inline status indicator showing an in-flight async operation and its outcome. The shadcn equivalent is just `Spinner` plus your own text and outcome icons — there is no state-machine component.

items.name: inline-notification
items.title: InlineNotification
items.description: A dismissible inline status banner with an X close button. Compose `Alert` + status icon + an `<AlertTitle>` / `<AlertDescription>` + a ghost `Button` for the close action.

items.name: loading
items.title: Loading
items.description: A page- or section-level spinner indicating that work is in progress. Use when content is fetching, a long-running action is pending, or a region of the UI must be visually blocked while waiting.

items.name: menu-button
items.title: MenuButton
items.description: A labelled button trigger that opens an action menu of clickable items. Use for grouping related actions behind a single labelled affordance — "Actions", "More", "Account" — when each item fires a callback.

items.name: modal
items.title: Modal
items.description: A focus-trapped overlay panel for tasks that require the user's full attention. Use for forms, multi-step flows, or detail views that interrupt the page until explicitly dismissed.

items.name: overflow-menu
items.title: OverflowMenu
items.description: An icon-only (`⋮`) trigger that opens an action menu. Use for row-level or compact actions where a labelled button would take too much space — table rows, list items, card corners.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: A presentational `<nav>` of page links — anchor-based, server-friendly, and unstyled by data semantics. Use to navigate between pre-computed pages where you own the page-number list and active-page state.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: A small floating panel anchored to a trigger. Use for transient, non-modal supplementary content — tooltips with rich markup, settings panels, lightweight forms — that is dismissed by clicking outside or pressing Escape.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A custom listbox for choosing one option from a list. Use in forms or filters when the user picks a single value from a finite, mutually exclusive set — and you want a styled dropdown rather than the OS-native picker.

items.name: skeleton-icon
items.title: SkeletonIcon
items.description: A small square placeholder for icon slots while content is loading. Use to reserve space and signal pending state where an icon will eventually render — beside a label, in a list row, or inside a button.

items.name: skeleton-text
items.title: SkeletonText
items.description: A line-shaped placeholder for text content while loading. Use to reserve space for headings, single labels, or paragraphs of body copy until the real text arrives.

items.name: structured-list
items.title: StructuredList
items.description: A read-only tabular layout for key/value pairs and simple data display. Use in profile panels, detail views, and metadata sections — anywhere a lightweight `<Table>` shape suits the content better than a full data table.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A thin presentational wrapper around native HTML table elements. Use for tabular data display where rows have a consistent column structure and no built-in sort/select/expand behaviour is required.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A Radix-based tab set that pairs each trigger with its panel by `value` string. Use to switch between sibling views inside a single page region — settings sections, detail panes, log filters.

items.name: tag
items.title: Tag
items.description: A small pill-shaped label. Use to categorise, label status, attribute metadata, or summarise a property of a parent element. The wrapper re-exports `Badge` from `badge/`.

items.name: text-area
items.title: TextArea
items.description: A styled native `<textarea>` for multi-line text input. Use for free-form content longer than a single line — descriptions, comments, JSON snippets, prose fields.

items.name: text-input
items.title: TextInput
items.description: A styled native `<input>` for single-line text entry. Use for any short string field — names, emails, search queries, numeric values, passwords. The wrapper re-exports `Input`.

items.name: tile
items.title: Tile
items.description: A bordered, padded surface for grouping related content. Use for dashboard cards, summary panels, list items in a card grid, or any rectangle of content that needs a consistent visual rhythm. The wrapper re-exports `Card` and its slots.

items.name: toast-notification
items.title: ToastNotification
items.description: A transient floating notification queued by an imperative `toast()` API. The wrapper re-exports `Toaster` and `toast` from `sonner/`. Use for ephemeral feedback after a user action — save success, async completion, errors that don't block the flow.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: A binary on/off switch (iOS-style sliding pill). The wrapper re-exports `Switch` — **not** the shadcn `Toggle` primitive, which is a pressable button. Use for settings that take effect immediately when flipped.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A short, text-only label that appears on hover or focus of a trigger. Use to clarify icon-only buttons, abbreviate long labels, or surface secondary info that doesn't deserve permanent screen space.
